title: Ubiquiti UACC-Rack-Panel-Vented-2U, rack mount OCD panel, 2U
description: Self-blinding strip with ventilation strips for better air circulation from Ubiquiti to 19" data cabinets, with a height of 2U and grey color . Suitable for elegant blinding or covering unused positions in the data switchboard and at the same time enabling the passage of air
